name: Henny Youngman
bio: Henny Youngman was an American comedian and musician known as the King of the One-Liners for his rapid-fire delivery of short, simple jokes, often punctuated by his violin. His best-known line, Take my wife... please, became one of the most famous jokes in American comedy, and his brisk style influenced generations of joke-tellers.

timeline.ev: Begins career as a musician and comic with the Swanee Syncopaters
Breaks through on Kate Smith's radio show

accolades: Dubbed the King of the One-Liners by columnist Walter Winchell
Coined the classic joke Take my wife... please

machine.reason: zero clips on file — every comic needs at least 1 official clip
